channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RHL] Promoter Arun Kumar Saraf of Robust Hotels Ltd Proposes Acquisition of Shares by Way of Gift
item.description:
Arun Kumar Saraf, a promoter of Robust Hotels Ltd, has submitted a prior intimation of the proposed acquisition of equity shares of the company by way of gift under Regulation 10(1)(a) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations. The proposed acquisition details are provided in the prescribed disclosure format. The acquisition is exempted from making an open offer as per the relevant sub-clause of regulation 10(1)(a). The acquirer has confirmed that all the conditions specified under regulation 10(1)(a) have been duly complied with.

  • Arun Kumar Saraf, a promoter of Robust Hotels Ltd, proposes to acquire equity shares by way of gift.
  • The proposed acquisition is in compliance with Regulation 10(5) of the SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
  • The acquisition price would not be higher by more than 25% of the price computed as per the regulations.
  • The acquirer has confirmed compliance with all conditions specified under regulation 10(1)(a).
  • The proposed acquisition details are provided in the prescribed disclosure format.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Robust Hotels Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ADANIENT] Adani Enterprises Ltd Approves Early Full Redemption of Non-Convertible Debentures Worth INR 1,950 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Adani Enterprises Ltd announced the approval of early full redemption of unlisted, secured, unrated, redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) worth INR 1,950 crores. The Management Committee of the Board of Directors made this decision during their meeting on Tuesday, March 24, 2026. The NCDs, with a face value of INR 1,00,000 each, were issued and allotted on a private placement basis. The redemption includes 1,25,000 NCDs worth INR 1250,00,00,000 issued on July 11, 2023, and 70,000 NCDs worth INR 700,00,00,000 issued on October 11, 2023. The company is awaiting necessary approvals for the redemption.

  • Adani Enterprises Ltd approves early full redemption of Non-Convertible Debentures
  • Total worth of the redemption is INR 1,950 crores
  • Includes 1,25,000 NCDs worth INR 1250,00,00,000 issued on July 11, 2023
  • Also includes 70,000 NCDs worth INR 700,00,00,000 issued on October 11, 2023
  • Awaiting necessary approvals for the redemption

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [TATVA] Trading Window Closure Announced by Tatva Chintan Pharma Chem Ltd for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Tatva Chintan Pharma Chem Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's code on prohibition of insider trading. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, 01 April 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31 March 2026. Designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the securities of the company during this period.

  • Trading window closure announced for Tatva Chintan Pharma Chem Ltd
  • Closure effective from 01 April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results
  • Applies to all designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • In compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Designated persons advised not to trade in the company's securities during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tatva Chintan Pharma Chem Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EPIC] EPIC Energy Ltd. Approves Allotment of 38,00,000 Convertible Warrants at Rs.50/- Each
item.description:
EPIC Energy Ltd. has approved the allotment of 38,00,000 Convertible Warrants at an issue price of Rs.50/- per warrant. The warrants are convertible into or exchangeable for one fully paid up equity share of face value of Rs.10/- each of the Company. The allotment is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. The total amount for the issuance is Rs.4,75,00,000/- (Rupees Four Crores Seventy-Five Lacs Only). The allotment is to the promoters and non-promoter investor category allottees.

  • EPIC Energy Ltd. has approved the allotment of 38,00,000 Convertible Warrants.
  • The warrants are convertible into or exchangeable for one fully paid up equity share of face value of Rs.10/- each of the Company.
  • The allotment is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018.
  • The total amount for the issuance is Rs.4,75,00,000/- (Rupees Four Crores Seventy-Five Lacs Only).
  • The allotment is to the promoters and non-promoter investor category allottees.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EPIC ENERGY LTD.-$ | Category: Investment

item.title: [ABBOTINDIA] Abbott India Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
In accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, Abbott India Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the Shares of the Company by the Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will begin from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, and will reopen after 48 hours from the declaration of the Annual Audited Financial Results of the Company for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Abbott India Ltd has closed the trading window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will begin from April 1, 2026, and will reopen after 48 hours from the declaration of the Annual Audited Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ABBOTT INDIA LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ZSARVAMA] Sarvamangal Mercantile Company Ltd Closes Trading Window for Quarter Four and Year Ended on March 31, 2026
item.description:
Sarvamangal Mercantile Company Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for Directors, Designated Persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure is in compliance with the Securities & Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from April 01, 2026 till forty eight hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results of the Company for the fourth quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for inter-alia considering and approving the Audited financial results of the Company for the fourth Quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026 will be intimated in due course.

  • Closure of trading window for Directors, Designated Persons, and their immediate relatives
  • Compliance with Securities & Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 01, 2026 till forty eight hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • The date of the Board Meeting for approving the Audited financial results will be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SARVAMANGAL MERCANTILE CO.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ATLASCYCLE] Atlas Cycles (Haryana) Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Atlas Cycles (Haryana) Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct. The closure will be effective from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March 2026.

  • Trading window closure announced by Atlas Cycles (Haryana) Ltd
  • Closure effective from 1st April 2026
  • Applies to all designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • In accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's Code of Conduct
  • Will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the year ending 31st March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ATLAS CYCLES (HARYANA) LTD. | Category: Other

item.title: [KUNSTOFF] Kunststoffe Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons Until After Q4 2026 Results
item.description:
Kunststoffe Industries Limited has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the Company for Designated Persons and Relatives of Designated Persons, effective from Wednesday, April 1, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the year and twelve months ended March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, circulars issued by the stock exchanges, and the Company's Code of Conduct. The date of the Board Meeting for the said Results will be informed to the Stock Exchanges in due course. Additionally, in line with the SEBI circular no. SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-PoD-2/P/CIR/2023/124 dated July 19, 2023, the PAN of Designated Persons of the Company will be frozen by the Designated Depository for trading in Equity Shares of the Company during the trading window closure period.

  • Kunststoffe Industries Ltd closes trading window for Designated Persons and Relatives of Designated Persons until after Q4 2026 results
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026
  • Decision in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, stock exchange circulars, and Company's Code of Conduct
  • Date of Board Meeting for the Results to be informed to Stock Exchanges in due course
  • PAN of Designated Persons of the Company to be frozen by the Designated Depository for trading in Equity Shares during the trading window closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KUNSTSTOFFE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SONAL] Trading Window Closed for Sonal Mercantile Ltd's Promoters and Designated Persons
item.description:
The trading window for promoters, Designated Persons and their immediate relatives of Sonal Mercantile Ltd will be closed from Wednesday, April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting scheduled to consider and approve the Audited Financial results for the year ended March 31°, 2026. The exact date of the Board Meeting is yet to be announced.

  • Trading window closure for promoters and Designated Persons of Sonal Mercantile Ltd
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours post Board Meeting
  • Board Meeting scheduled to consider and approve the Audited Financial results for the year ended March 31°, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sonal Mercantile Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PARKHOTELS] Promoter of Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd, Priya Paul, Acquires 0.01353% Shares
item.description:
Priya Paul, one of the promoters of Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd, has acquired 28,875 fully paid-up equity shares (~0.01353%) of the company through an on-market purchase on March 23, 2026. The consolidated shareholding of the Promoter and Promoter Group is now 14,55,21,283 fully paid-up equity shares, representing 68.20002% of the total share capital.

  • Priya Paul, a promoter of Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd, acquired 0.01353% shares of the company.
  • The acquisition was made through an on-market purchase on March 23, 2026.
  • The total share capital of the company remains unchanged after the transaction.
  • The Promoter and Promoter Group now hold 68.20002% of the total share capital.
  • The acquisition was made on the BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd | Category: Investment
